name: Lexibook - Linguistic Electronic System Societe anonyme
summary: Lexibook - Linguistic Electronic System Soci√É¬©t√É¬© anonyme designs, manufactures, and distributes various consumer electronics products primarily for the children and adolescents in France, rest of Europe, and internationally. It offers dictionaries and calculators, watchmaking products, electronic games, toys, consoles, educational robots, speakers and headphones, digital cameras and DVD players, alarm clocks, walkie-talkies and mobile phones, karaoke and musical instruments, educational tablets, and lighting and decorative products. The company sells its products under the Lexibook, LexiTab, Yeno, Movecam, Cyber Arcade, Chessman, Decotech, iParty, Acoustix, and BioToys brands. It operates primarily Disney, Marvel, Star Wars, Minions, Scrabble, Larousse, The Voice, and Pat'Patrouille licenses. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Les Ulis, France.
